Get paid quicker and easier! Reduce your late payments by 50%.
Our features include:

Real-time metrics on your Account Receivable collection
Automated and personalized workflows
Payment portals adapted to each customer

We integrate directly with different accounting solutions like Quickbooks, Netsuite, or Xero and can also develop specific APIs. Our partnerships with Stripe and Go Cardless streamline payments for your customers.

name: Spokn
description: Developer of a podcast platform designed to help organizations improve internal communications and upskill their employees. The company's platform creates internal company podcasts regarding weekly team recaps, strategy updates, new hire welcomes, and announcements, enabling employees and business leaders to communicate messages conveniently.

name: Squadio
description: Developer of a tech talent platform designed to build teams with remote talents. The company's platform focus on services such as vetting, hiring engineers and payroll services plus the option of a product manager per squad, enabling companies to hire the right person for the right job and manage their team efficiently.

name: StakPak
description: Stakpak is an AI-powered DevOps IDE that helps you build, maintain and self-serve software infrastructure.

name: Stllr Network
description: Developer of a marketing platform designed to provide experts in performance advertisement. The company's platform provides instant access to teams, shares cross-departmental insights, monitors project timelines, and tracks goals, enabling clients with instant access to vetted marketing experts and teams for monthly projects.

name: STORI AI Inc.
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-based marketing content automation software designed for streamlining brand building & content creation. The company's software forms an isolated brand identity tailored to goals, defining archetype, tone, tagline, and colors for a strong presence, enabling clients to captivate the audience with visually stunning and emotionally engaging content.

name: Stuck
description: Developer of an on-demand technology platform designed to provide quality and hassle-free writing. The company's platform helps to provide translation from Arabic to English, proofreading of the documents, rephrasing and revamping the contents, content development, and language branding to create the desired tone and message, enabling individuals and businesses to get language support.

name: El-Dokan
description: Operator of an information technology consulting company intended to develop enterprise e-commerce software designed for large and growing retail stores. The company's expertise involves end-to-end software development and web application development for e-commerce businesses, enabling clients to focus more on their core businesses.

name: Sweater
description: Developer of booking platform intended to provide car washing services. The company allows users to book appointments through its application and provides easy and convenient services, helping customers to get the car washing service at the right time and place at a competitive price.

name: Sweply
description: Sweply makes it simple to create, manage and analyze digital marketing campaigns on multiple platforms from one place.

name: Taker
description: Developer of an online ordering platform designed to facilitate food ordering and restaurant management. The company's platform leverages technology which is used to expand digitally to adapt to customers' changing behavior and service expectations by seamlessly receiving the orders to prepare for pickup or delivery, enabling restaurants of all sizes to engage better with customers and improve their sales.

name: Tamatem
description: Developer of localized versions of mobile games designed to serve games tailored to the language and culture of the region. The company's mobile games are published with partners from international studios and developers taking their games and making them culturally relevant for the Arabic gamer, enabling users to optimize and monetize their games.

name: Tammwel
description: Developer of a loan comparison platform intended to help customers and clients find financial offers. The company's platform offers quotes for financing automobiles, real estate, and personal loans and also features tools for tracking loan reimbursement and payments, enabling loan seekers to connect with commercial loan providers.

name: Taskeer Holdings Limited
description: Provider of financial solutions intended to facilitate traditional monthly group savings. The company's platform enables monthly collections that contribute to facilitating money-saving concepts, taking into consideration any challenges and constraints, enabling consumers to get assurance of quality standards, trusted members and accurate receiving dates.

name: Taskty
description: Operator of an online marketplace intended to book service providers for home services. The company's marketplace allows users to connect with housekeeping personels who offer household services, such as home hygiene, furniture washing, pest control, plumbing, carpentry, electricity, air conditioning, and more, enabling customers to choose from a wide range of services as per their budget.

name: TeamUp
description: Developer of an online sports leagues and tournaments management application designed to track individual players' stats. The company's platform follows a multiple-tier revenue model based on subscriptions, commissions, advertising and monetization of big data, enabling customers to get a big enough pool of players, and enough data, to begin their scouting activities.

name: TechieMatter
description: Developer of a recruitment platform intended to find the desired technical talent. The company's platform connects employers with prospective candidates through a network of various tech verifiers, information technology sources, filters and technical assessments, enabling companies to find the right talent that fits their needs.

name: Telgani
description: Developer of a car rental platform intended to help users rent their desired cars. The company's platform allows users to pick the car and the location they want to travel to and provides options for nearby providers to compare and book car rides, enabling customers to rent cars at competitive prices.

name: Tenex
description: Developer of a tenant engagement platform designed to optimize the commercial real estate experience for tenants. The company's platform specializes in providing tech-enabled services to handle and manage properties, enabling property managers and landlords to offer quality services to their clients.

name: Text'nPayMe
description: Developer of a payment application designed to turn any text or voice command to make payments. The company's application offers a convenient way to make payments across any digital platform through a payment interface, enabling users to get hassle-free transaction services.

name: Truelli
description: Provider of pre-diagnostics menstrual pad intended to offer women instant health insights. The company develops pads that are designed to be worn like a menstrual pad and contain a small sensor that collects blood samples that are then analyzed by its cloud-based platform, enabling customers to get alerts instantly via mobile application.

name: TruKKer
description: Developer of a logistics and fleet management platform designed to simplify road freight and logistics operations. The company's platform aids in integrating available trucks to the users in real-time and integrates capacity with demand accordingly to ensure maximum asset utilization to reduce overall transportation costs, enabling shippers, carriers, and businesses to get cross-border transportation services with ease.

name: Twinn Health
description: Developer of healthcare tools intended for early disease detection using imaging and AI tools to extend a healthy human lifespan. The company's platform uses MRI scanning and AI to get information about metabolism and body composition, enabling healthcare professionals to look for warning signs of potential inflammation, damage, and disease in major organs, muscles, and bones.

name: Ubeya
description: Developer of a workforce management platform designed for businesses employing temporary workers as part of the gig economy. The company offers an employee application that manages employee networks and helps businesses to shorten communication cycles within their organization through a shared contacts list application, enabling business and agency leaders to optimize processes, scheduling, communication, payroll, and compliance.

name: Unisub LLC
description: Developer of recurring crypto payment platform designed to allow people to avail subscriptions through crypto. The company's platform integrates crypto subscriptions, that make payments automatic, so customers don't have to make a payment or manually enter their payment information, enabling businesses to accept recurring crypto payments.

name: User1st
description: Provider of a website-access software designed to provide access to proprietary automated accessibility tools. The company's software offers a cloud-based application that meets the needs of a wide range of customers to ensure their digital content is accessible, enabling professionals, webmasters, content managers, user experience managers and developers to make any website accessible without changing the existing codebase.

name: UTURN
description: Operator of an entertainment network intended to produce premium content with the aim to promote Arabic content globally. The company's entertainment network produces multimedia content that can be availed via Uturn application and YouTube, thereby providing users with social, fun and interactive multimedia content.

name: Valeo
description: Developer of personalized mobile health tracker designed to optimize health. The company's health tracker provides users with access and insight into their wellness data, consumers can purchase packages through the application, combining wellness tests and personalized advice from certified coaches, enabling users to track their health.

name: Vbout
description: Developer of a marketing automation platform designed to provide email marketing and automation, social media, landing pages, and analytics in one dashboard. The company's platform includes email and social media tools, lead intelligence, and comprehensive analytics while also assisting in creating a sales funnel to convert visitors into leads by nurturing them with automated, personalized content, enabling clients to make their marketing efforts efficient and effective, all from one dashboard.

name: Verofax
description: Developer of a blockchain-based intelligent application suite designed to help achieve complete inventory oversight and create immersive experiences. The company's platform is powered by smart serialization and traceability offering connected products and intelligent data analytics, enabling businesses to increase sales and reduce costs by streamlining operations, improving control over operations and automating processes.

name: Vetwork
description: Operator of an on-demand veterinary services marketplace intended to make pet-care services more accessible, timely, and convenient. The company's application offers pet grooming, deworming, vaccination, medical, and many more pet care services, enabling pet owners to access reliable and affordable pet care services and book them online.

name: VS1 Finance
description: VS1 is a non-custodial DeFi hub built on the XRP Ledger that integrates trading, AI execution, portfolio tools, and tokenized RWA exposure — all in one place.

name: 360 VUZ
description: Developer of a social video mobile application intended to offer a virtual reality-based entertainment experience. The company's application streams live virtual sports, talk shows, music, and events with gyroscope support, enabling users to experience live events and shows in an immersive manner.

name: Walzay
description: Operator of a talent marketplace intended to provide full-time job opportunities with innovative companies and teams. The company allows candidates to explore opportunities around the world for in-office or remote roles, enabling candidates to avail an efficient hiring platform and companies to get suitable candidates for their job roles.

name: Wellxai
description: Opeartor of an insurance technology intended to support wellness activities. The company aims to disrupt the insurance landscape in the region by offering individuals, families, corporates, and SMEs health insurance that incentivizes engagement in various wellness activities such as gym visits, healthy eating, focusing on mental wellness, utilizing wearable tech, and also provides a third-party embedded device along with an application that monitors health, enabling users to make efficient insurance decisions.

name: WizerMe
description: Developer of an online student engagement platform designed to help teachers to create their own interactive worksheets, and find relevant materials. The company's platform provides insights into the child's progress and status, offering immediate feedback and encouragement, enabling teachers to leverage a social and gamified learning experience for their students.

name: Workhint
description: Developer of B2B SaaS solutions intended to help create a matching platform for different business functions. The company's system creates a platform in three steps that are named supply & demand, select request block, and invite users, the whole can be used in different use-cases and functions like advisory, mentorship, telemedicine, freelance management, and part-timers management, enabling organizations to reduce cost, improve productivity, and drive insight-driven decisions.

name: Wuilt
description: Operator of a website-building portal intended to help users create professional websites. The company gives them more control over their brand and customer experience and allows brands to create their own custom online store without having to worry about the technical aspects of running an e-commerce business, enabling users to take the hassle out of web design and build their own websites.

name: Souqalmal
description: Operator of financial education wellbeing platform designed for employees in the Middle East. The company's platform offers information related to credit cards, personal loans, car loans, bank accounts, mortgages, insurance, mobile phone plans, broadband plans, schools, and nurseries, enabling users to make informed financial decisions.

name: Yasmina AI - Insurance
description: Yasmina is an embedded insurance provider that allows online businesses to customize and sell policies to their users.

name: Zengaming
description: Developer of e-sports social networking platform designed to offer a social hub for playing community-based games. The company's platform offers an internet sports discovery network and specializes in trading, buying, and selling in-game virtual assets both on centralized and decentralized platforms, enabling players to connect with teams, sponsors, and other sports enthusiasts and create their professional profiles, as well as compete with each other.

name: ZenHR
description: Developer of a human resource management software designed to help human resource departments and employees achieve peace of mind. The company's software offers various features including attendance and time tracking, onboarding or offboarding, employee data management, recruitment, payroll and reporting tools, enabling clients to enjoy a smooth experience from employee onboarding to retirement.

name: Zest
description: Operator of an investment services platform intended to democratize access to venture, empowering investors, founders, and their companies on one platform. The company's platform gives access to secondary investing for businesses by filling a gap by offering investors an accessible entry point to this attractive asset class with a platform that automates the overall transaction process, enabling businesses to take part in investment activity smoothly.

name: Zoog.A.I.
description: Developer of a visual communication platform designed to interact in a fresh and fun way. The company's platform offers an asynchronous communication experience to bring books to life using built-in AR masks, filters, sound effects, and animations, enabling people to create meaningful family moments.

name: Olev
description: Provider of an application designed to integrate city transportation. The company's application offers cab booking services that helps users to call a cab on a click of a button, provide private drivers at affordable rates and make online payment of the bill, enabling users to travel at any point in city very easily.

name: Ostaz
description: Developer of a mobile-based tutoring platform intended to connect students seeking help in a specific course to private tutors. The company's tutoring platform connects students to tutors based on their preferences such as location, rating, availability, and other related factors, enabling students to enhance their academic performance.

name: Jeeng
description: Developer of a technology platform intended to increase recurring traffic in a smart way. The company's technology platform provides a mobile-based application, enabling publishers and website owners to help their users to track any topic on your site and be notified when new content is published.

name: Storemaven
description: Provider of an A/B testing platform designed to ascertain application store conversion rates. The company's platform can find the optimal combination of icon, description and screenshots to drive install conversion in the app stores, enabling application developers to gain insights on user behavior in the stores by tracking and analyzing over 10,000,000 data points.

name: Yacob
description: Developer of nutrition management platform intended to combat childhood obesity rates. The company's platform is an AI-enabled nutrition recommendation engine for the school food ecosystem, enabling parents to monitor and manage children's dietary requirements.

name: YouScan
description: Developer of lead generation tools designed to connect businesses with their potential clients on social media networks. The company's lead generation tools analyzes millions of public social media posts and uses sophisticated language processing algorithms to find social media messages that express an intention to buy a certain product or service, enabling businesses that provide relevant products or services to reach out to the author of the messages.

name: Paraşüt
description: Devloper of a cloud-based financial software designed to offer invoice management services. The company's software offers bookkeeping tools to small and medium-sized businesses, featuring e-invoicing, e-billing, as well as online revenue and expenditure tracking system, enabling clients to save time and human resource.

name: Skygiraffe
description: Developer of an enterprise-grade mobility platform designed to mobilize line-of-business applications. The company's platform helps businesses to deploy enterprise-grade mobile applications on any device immediately and without the need for writing code, enabling employees to read and write-back data through customized mobile business applications.

name: Texel
description: Provider of a virtual reality platform designed to stream VR and AR content material over existing networks. The company's data driven platform collects data points in real time to provide insights into users' viewing and engagement habits in order to provide a personalized content mix and reduce the bandwidth by more than 50 percent, enabling content providers to understand the deep consumption nature and how to leverage insights to optimize value of their content to result in higher engagement and better monetization.

name: Bankiom
description: Developer of a financial platform dedicated to providing a hassle-free banking experience. The company's platform offers digital banking and money management services, loan approvals as well as unparalleled customer support, enabling customers to organize their finances in a simplified manner.

name: Inofab
description:
Inofab Health has joined Carbon Health by 2022 April! 

Inofab Health® is a digital health company that offers revolutionary respiratory care solutions for home and professional use with a human-centric approach and cutting-edge technology. It provides a software platform for functional respiratory care management, state-of-the-art ultrasonic personal & clinic spirometers, along with connected inhaler attachments with a strong focus on misuse detection. Inofab Health alerts any declines in lung health, allowing quick intervention against symptom onset and preventing unnecessary hospitalizations.

name: Peoplise
description: Provider of a cloud-based recruitment platform designed to help HR practitioners to utilize digital and analytical technologies. The company's platform to help in talent acquisition process and create the better teams for business with lower turn-over, higher performance, enabling users to target the candidates via employer-branded advertisements and video-enabled digital screening.

name: TestFairy
description: Developer of an online application testing platform designed to integrate bug-tracking and update user experience. The company's online application testing platform allows users a seamless branded corporate experience for downloading apps and reporting bugs, enabling users to update their application continuously with various technical reforms.

name: Eventtus
description: Provider of an event engagement platform designed to maximize networking opportunities for attendees. The company's event engagement application offers event planning, networking and ticketing services, enabling event organizers to share content, understand their audiences, measure success and improve future planning.

name: RestAR
description: Developer of a cloud-based 3D scanning and AR technology intended to convert physical products into the content. The company's software combines both computer vision and deep learning algorithms based on cutting-edge academic research where owners to scan and render high-quality 3D content based on physical products in e-commerce and food markets using a mobile device, enabling business to enhance the consumers' overall experience.
